thread.subject: How do I set up the board?
thread.author: player1

article.subject: How do I set up the board?
article.body:
The rulebook says to place the pixel tiles face-down but the setup diagram shows them face-up. Which is correct?

Thanks!

article.subject: Re: How do I set up the board?
article.body: Great catch! The diagram is correct — tiles go face-up. The rulebook has a typo that will be fixed in the next print run.

article.subject: Re: How do I set up the board?
